# name

**Instance Property**

A descriptive name for the material property.

## Declaration

```swift
var name: String { get set }
```

## Discussion

A material property’s name is not used for rendering, but it can be useful in debugging. Model Model I/O  may set a material property’s name to a format-specific value when loading materials from an [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset] object.

## Using a Material Property

- **semantic**: The semantic meaning for the material property’s value.
- **type**: The data type stored in the material property’s value.
